---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in dashboards, alerts, or observability validation assets
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the defect clearly.

## Affected area

- Dashboard or visualization
- Alert rule
- Validation workflow
- Documentation

## Current behavior

What is happening now?

## Expected behavior

What should happen instead?

## Reproduction or evidence

Provide screenshots, failing rules, logs, or affected service context.

## Impact

- [ ] Breaks operational visibility
- [ ] Breaks alerting confidence
- [ ] Breaks validation workflows
- [ ] Affects multiple services or environments

## Notes

Add affected dashboards, alerts, or follow-up context here.
